author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: breach_compression
summary: Validates a Nikto-style BREACH finding by checking the four preconditions (TLS + HTTP compression + reflected input + secret-shaped value in the same response).

args.--cookie: Cookie header to send (use the victim's session cookie when available so the response carries real per-user secrets)
args.--reflect-param: Query-param name used to probe for reflected input (default 'breach_probe')
args.--require-tls: If set, treat plain-HTTP targets as definitively NOT exploitable (BREACH only applies to TLS)
